Incident Postmortem — January 18, 2024: The production API experienced a 47-minute outage beginning at 2:14 AM PST due to a failed database failover triggered by a network partition in the primary availability zone. The detection-to-mitigation timeline was longer than target because the automated alerting threshold was set too conservatively, delaying PagerDuty notification by 12 minutes. Root cause was a misconfigured health check interval that caused premature promotion of a replica with stale data. Remediation actions include reducing the health check interval to 10 seconds, adding a pre-promotion data lag check, and updating runbooks for the database failover procedure.
